findings.issue: State machine lacks explicit mode transition guards for Full/Mid/Low UI modes. Core assessment flow may break during mode switches.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement mode-specific rendering guards and transition animations in AdaptiveLayout.jsx. Validate UI mode persistence via localStorage.

findings.issue: Compliance criteria for UI mode toggling are ambiguously defined. Missing concrete validation rules for each mode's functionality.
findings.recommended_fix: Add granular test cases for each UI mode in skills/energy-adaptation-law-2.md. Define explicit rendering requirements for each mode.
